# Research Reputation-Risk Checklist

## Artifact
- Artifact ID: ____
- Evaluator: ____ (must be independent for publication-ready claims)

## Risk classes
- [ ] R1 — NOVELTY_OVERCLAIM: Is novelty claimed without prior-art analysis?
- [ ] R2 — PRIOR_ART_OMISSION: Are nearest neighbors omitted from related work?
- [ ] R3 — EVIDENCE_STRENGTH_INFLATION: Is evidence quality or certainty overstated?
- [ ] R4 — REPRODUCIBILITY_GAP: Is reproducibility claimed without environment lock?
- [ ] R5 — METHOD_OPACITY: Are methods insufficient for scrutiny?
- [ ] R6 — AUTHORSHIP_MISREPRESENTATION: Is authorship or contributions misattributed?
- [ ] R7 — UNDISCLOSED_AI_ASSISTANCE: Is material AI assistance not disclosed?
- [ ] R8 — CONFLICT_NONDISCLOSURE: Are conflicts or incentives not disclosed?
- [ ] R9 — ETHICS_BOUNDARY_FAILURE: Is human-subjects or sensitive-data boundary not checked?
- [ ] R10 — DATA_RIGHTS_FAILURE: Are dataset, code, image, or quotation rights not verified?
- [ ] R11 — VENUE_POLICY_NONCOMPLIANCE: Are venue-specific rules not checked at submission time?
- [ ] R12 — PUBLICITY_BEFORE_VALIDATION: Are public claims made before evidence and review are stable?
- [ ] R13 — FAILURE_TO_CORRECT: Are errors not corrected promptly and visibly?
- [ ] R14 — DISCIPLINE_PRESTIGE_BORROWING: Is academic credibility implied without earning it?
- [ ] R15 — TERMINOLOGY_COLONIZATION: Is namespace or terminology claimed without justification?

## Result
- Risks identified: ____
- Risks mitigated: ____
- Unresolved risks: ____
